MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-02-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED AS TO THE $500 CLAIMED FOR EDUCATION AND CHILD CARE. THE BALANCE OF THE CLAIM IS GRANTED. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Opposition
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC's hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted in part. The claim of exemption is denied as to the $500 claimed for education and child care. The balance of the claim is granted. Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)
